title: chrysopsis villosa var. camphorata
intro: Chrysopsis villosa var. camphorata, also known as Camphor Bays or Camphor Bay, is a plant species native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as skin conditions like acne and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for its medicinal uses.
